mapper.select: SELECT * FROM channel WHERE channel_id = #{channelId} AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM channel WHERE slug = #{slug} AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM channel WHERE parent_channel_id = #{parentChannelId} AND status = 1 AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY seq
SELECT * FROM channel WHERE status = 1 AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY seq
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO channel (channel_name, slug, parent_channel_id, icon, cover_image, description, channel_type, status, seq) VALUES (#{channelName}, #{slug}, #{parentChannelId}, #{icon}, #{coverImage}, #{description}, #{channelType}, #{status}, #{seq})
mapper.update:
UPDATE channel
channel_name = #{channelName}, slug = #{slug}, parent_channel_id = #{parentChannelId}, icon = #{icon}, cover_image = #{coverImage}, description = #{description}, channel_type = #{channelType}, status = #{status}, seq = #{seq},
WHERE channel_id = #{channelId} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE channel SET deleted = 1 WHERE channel_id = #{channelId}
